title: Replace hardcoded logs in audit/index.vue with API data
acceptance_criteria: app/pages/audit/index.vue no longer contains a hardcoded const logs = [...] array.
The page fetches data using useFetch('/api/vault/audit-notes') and types the response as { auditNotes: AuditNoteResponse[] }.
A loading state (spinner or skeleton) is shown while pending is true.
An empty state message is shown when auditNotes.length === 0.
Each audit note row displays: message (title), source (subtitle), and createdAt formatted as relative time (e.g. '2h ago').
If the note has a taskId, it renders a NuxtLink to /tasks/${note.taskId}.
bun run typecheck exits with code 0 — no TypeScript errors in the file.
No unused imports remain (Clock, Filter, Download must be removed if not used after the rewrite).
completion_summary: Replaced the hardcoded audit log array with useFetch('/api/vault/audit-notes'), added loading and empty states, relative timestamps, filter input, and task links.
